annotations.label: Copula

anchor.snippet: a copula is a multivariate cumulative distribution function for which the marginal probability distribution of each variable is uniform

annotations.note: Mathlib has a 1-D CDF (ProbabilityTheory.cdf) and uniform distributions but no multivariate CDF or copula concept (CDF.lean's TODO explicitly notes ℝⁿ extension is unfinished).

annotations.label: Probability integral transform yields uniform marginals

anchor.snippet: has marginals that are uniformly distributed on the interval

annotations.note: Both the CDF (ProbabilityTheory.cdf) and uniform distribution (MeasureTheory.pdf.IsUniform) are formalized, but the theorem that F(X) is uniform on [0,1] is not present.
